sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36749" key="e)canapei/qw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξανα-πείθω</orth>, <sense id="n36749.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">win over,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεούς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0213.tlg001:7:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermesian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
